text: The smell of fried food, powdered sugar, and slightly-burned soykaf is almost enough to overpower the dusty sewage stench of Redmond's streets. The troll working the stand is covered in food stains older than he is.

The holodesk zooms in to display a mainframe computer room, several offices and magical research libraries for the Brotherhood's Mothers and Fathers and an extensive network of tunnels that the offices connect to.

The small meat stand presents an enormous diversity of dead animals - from cow and canine to the exotic and paranormal. The pictures on the back of the stand feature a much older version of the man in front of you.

I get it. Gotta be careful in this trade. I'm not one to go back on a deal though, John can vouch for that. Plus, you know where I'm hiding out, right? Doesn't leave me a lot of room to sell you out.
This is one of the two that got away. If I hadn't missed my shot, these idiots would have given up and moved on by now.
We don't know each other too well, but it seems to me that you need to find a better group of people to associate with.

If it was just the drinking, it would have been bad. But Sam wasn't the monogamous type. He dabbled in everything. Booze... chips... drugs - he loved the Nitro - whatever he could get his hands on.
I'm fine. And a job will help me get my mind off... things. Anyway, just keep me in mind. I gotta do this now. The afternoon checklist isn't gonna finish itself.
Yep. Sure as I'm standing here. I am going to take a flamethrower to that whole slagging business. One squat at a time, if I have to.

So, I set up a dead man's switch to send you this call. I got a hundred thousand nuyen insurance policy, payable when you find who creased me. Alive with a conviction or in a body bag with justification - either works.

When you're an unsavory character like myself, you tend to associate with other unsavory characters who often partake in unsavory business... like you, for example. So, why am I dead? Who knows. Probably my fault.
Well, you're a dumbass and I'll drink to you when you're dead. Aw, who am I kidding? I'm not gonna outlast you. Guess you can drink to me.

Self-destruction. It was Sam's path, and it is humanity's path, if we don't make a change, if we don't embrace a new way of thinking. We must put each other first. And this is the basis of my new family.

My mother deserved honor and dignity. I gave her that today. She's finally whole again with a proper Catholic burial. Those ghouls who stole her organs, including Sam, have paid the price for their sins!
At a glance, you can tell that Sam's sister Jessica is from a different world - the opposite of Sam in almost every way. Her suit is tailored, her eyes are sharp, and her style exudes authority.

Self-destruction. It was Sam's path, and it is humanity's path, if we don't make a change, if we don't embrace a new way of thinking. We must put each other first. And this is the basis of my new family.

Okay, for the record, I never really died, per se. I was just... resting a bit. The important thing is that I'm here, I'm wearing lipstick, and I have a big fragging gun full of pesticide. Let's do this!
By "fix it", you mean convince a municipal government to abandon a bureaucratic process that has likely been in the works for several years. You do not have a grasp on how governments work.
Finally, by performing what has to be a truly disgusting ritual, the shaman serving the insect totem implants the spirit into the host - willingly or not. Then it's feeding time.

Apparently, Mr. Silverstar's reputation for paranoia is well-founded. This panel is a hard-coded door control that cannot be accessed from the Matrix. It was not here yesterday. How did he have it installed so fast?

Samedi will be part of this evening's events, but must remain remote. He will keep all of Seattle law enforcement and off-duty Telestrian Security away, while you locate the information we need from inside.

Great work mon ami! The time for stealth has passed, it has set off every alarm in the system but I have unlocked the executive elevator and your path is clear. Head to the elevator and make your escape!

Great work mon ami! The time for stealth has passed, it has set off every alarm in the system but I have unlocked the executive elevator and your path is clear. Head to the elevator and make your escape!
There must be a way to get in there! We must get that sample, but for now I suggest you eliminate the remaining guards. Unless you think stealing high security corp assets benefits from witnesses.

When a girl accumulated enough money to open her own place of business, she named it the Seamstresses Union so potential workers would know that they would be treated fairly there. And thus, a rich tradition was born.

Indeed. Normally, I require a percentage of the runner's income for the use of this facility but as I said, you are family now. Consider it on the house. To gain entrance, play G-A-F-F-C on the piano.
I understand. I will unlock the piano so you may go downstairs. Someone down there should be able to help you, if they are awake. It is likely that you will visit the Matrix before the day is done.
I sense a cause and effect in this. Coyote and Jake Armitage just left here to attend Sam's funeral. I am told that there will be a reinterment ceremony for his mother as well.
In addition to Mr. Delilah, you may wish to speak to Van Graas. He is often stage-side. Van Graas is most often a "receiver of found articles" but he occasionally has work.

Not necessarily. I don't know any surgeons who still use scalpels, anymore. These days it's all done with computer-controlled lasers. Could be anyone from a military field surgeon to an antique medicine aficionado.

It's a nearby club in the Barrens that attracts lowlifes. You'd probably like it. Me, I'm not really the going-out type. Always too much to be done around here. Plus, the dead are just easier to get along with.
I see. Well, you're right, he's here. Not too many people know about the murder yet, though... the press haven't caught wind of it yet, what with it being all the way out here in the Barrens.
This is only the third body I've personally examined. One of our other branch managers handled the other two. If I find that more of the victims had organ transplants, I'll let you know.
Yeah, that's what it looks like. As you can see, the Ripper went for the eyes this time. Pretty clean work. I gotta hand it to him, our Ripper knows what he's doing. Or she, I suppose.

I've been around a long time and I've seen a lot of avatars running around the ‘trix. A lot of ‘em. You ask me, it's just some guy trying to look scary to make a name for himself. Think of it as "personal branding".

I'm really impressed with his results, considering it was his first attempt, he was utilizing an unproven technique he'd read about in a science journal, and he was working from memory on minimal sleep.
This guy clearly did not want to be found. If I was you, I'd hire a team before heading over there. I sideloaded a ton of valuable data from those Lonestar matrix nodes. Here's your cut.
So here's what we know. Our DNA evidence belongs to a dead man, whose death was never explained. He worked with chop shops... which fits with the LIVING guy that you've met.
True. Quite true. And I keep my mouth shut about it, too. That's the secret to keeping a job here... and staying alive in general. Gotta work. See ya 'round.

I just got in but I think Coyote's cleaning the back bar. Mr. Delilah is hanging out in his usual place. The vendors downstairs came in a few minutes after me. Oh, and Bartlett's here. Don't think you've met him yet.
Hang on. I saw Sam's sister when she was here the other day. She was as corp as they come but I can't imagine a lady like that behind a series of murders. There's gotta be something else going on.
I didn't think so. You look like a runner to me. We're trained to spot a bronze the minute they walk in here. Something I can help you with?
Wow. I never would've figured. She just seemed so... I don't know. Bellevue, I guess. Wouldn't want to get her hands dirty.
Uh, I can't remember. He made it sound like royalty. You know someone called The Duke or something like that?
I am sure you appreciate a good slum as much as the next shadowrunner. However, I fail to see the significance of the Redmond Barrens or its energy resources in the context of this conversation.
Of course. Here is my proposal. If you prevent the Queen from being summoned and destroy the insects in the next, one million nuyen will be divided by the surviving team members.
I fail to see the connection between a murder and a raid on one of my office buildings. There is no connection between the research project and a murder that I am aware of.
That is for others to determine. People other than you. Still, you have turned in a yeoman's effort, and - regardless of your obvious flaws - you are deserving of a reward.
Yes, you were of service. There can be no debate on that topic. A yeoman's effort, to be sure, and - regardless of your obvious flaws - you are deserving of a reward.

You're not a regular, and you don't have the look of some wage slave thrill-seeker braving Touristville. You're new in town, and showing up on the heels of Sam's death. Stands to reason you're here about him.

People are starting to say there is some dark drek going down in those chapter houses. Like they're taking advantage of the poor folk who go there looking for help. I gotta say, that makes my blood boil.
If I had any reason to suspect that, you'd be on the floor. But seeing as how you walked in together, I'm going to assume you had something to do with her being found. You have my thanks.
Word got around about that latest Ripper killing, and people aren't feeling safe. And when people feel unsafe, they either go to ground or they huddle up.
There's been more talk of the Ripper killings. Some people are saying they're hate crimes on account of the victims all being human.

Towering over the diminutive coroner is a homicide detective right out of Central Casting - if you ignore the tusks, pointed ears, and neanderthal brow. You can smell his cheap aftershave from a mile away.
This warehouse contains the spirits of plane crash victims trapped between worlds. They wish to help. They wish to be heard. And I think they have something to say about my brother's murder.
You wanna help? Do what you're fragging told. That's how you can help. Who's the Native broad? This is a crime scene, Officer Aguirre, not some Salish drum circle.
Mr. Telestrian wants to meet you in person. He wants to chat about last night's fun an' games. You can come along quietly or you can meet him in a body bag.
You're dumber than I thought. Enjoy your chat. I'll dispose of your body later.

To give you a hard number is difficult. There are many who I would have considered patients that never made it home. And so I suppose one could say they died while under my care, though not as a result of it.

Oh, but who am I kidding? I know your type all too well. Words of caution have little worth, and words of prohibition only make you more eager to throw yourself into the fire. You're like children that way.

This little guy supports the healing rituals I perform on my patients after surgery, dramatically reducing their recovery time. Not standard procedure, of course, but the results speak for themselves.
Of course, we were expressly forbidden to follow in their footsteps. We were all expected to attend university and take full advantage of the opportunities they had fought so hard to give us.
Okay folks, I'm going to have to ask you go sit in the waiting area. Watch some trivid or something. This young lady and I have work to do.

Gino wrenches his wrist from Coyote's grasp and he staggers back, reaches under his shirt and pulls out a gun. Coyote watches him, horrified, with tears in her eyes. Gino waves it around, blinking wildly.
Conversation with all the information in the conversation that would trigger without already having a keycard. Getting the keycard is missing in this one.
No matter what, I don't want any collateral damage in there. Shoot all the BTL pushers you want but no chip-heads die, if we can help it. Got it?
You hear right. I got a few. I sell ‘em at a discount. Charlie charges 50 nuyen for ‘em but I can get you three for 100¥.
Hey, we can't all be... like you. Please, I just need one BTL to get through the day. Two, tops. What do you say?

You must understand, a shaman does not follow the literal incarnation of his totem. One who pledges himself to Cat does not drink milk from a saucer or claw the drapes. Instead, a shaman follows the ideals of his totem.
I understand that you have saved the day by moving a troubled soul from this plane to another. I congratulate you. Is there magic I could provide to help you with your next task?
Sadly, not all who are Awakened to the astral plane have their eyes so opened. There are plenty of magicians who revel in the dark energies left in astral space.
I knew you would be back - the stars foretold it. Actually, it was more like the laws of supply and demand. What magical needs can I satisfy?
Dark clouds surround you, my friend. But perhaps there is something I could provide that would help with whatever weighs so heavily upon you?

You are delusional and need help. Our counselors could help you find the stability that you clearly need. Surely there some other gift of wisdom I may give to help you find your way out of the darkness.
This is different! Those sickos have a simsense recording studio over there! Overheard them say they have a 'special guest' up in the penthouse. They plan to torture her with MY SON'S DYING BREATH!
My friend, you are delusional. Grandmother Jessica is a bringer of new life and truth. She is spending time focusing herself in the Inner Sanctum, where she is protected from the likes of you.
Those sickos have a simsense recording studio over there! Overheard them say they have a "special guest" up in the penthouse. They plan to torture her with a recording of MY SON'S DYING BREATH!
I understand. I'm afraid that I cannot help you. Grandmother Jessica has entered the Inner Sanctum to meditate and cannot be disturbed. If you wish, I can tell her that you asked for her.

The Royale Apartments. The landlord, Stevie J, runs a drug ring outta that hellhole. Coyote grew up there... doesn't like to talk about it much. She's been looking for a way to settle the score with that guy for years.
Oh.. drek! THAT's why Coyote wanted zebra meat. Everyone talks about the pet Hellhounds Stevie J keeps locked up somewhere in the Royale. And if she never picked it up...
Sure. Of course. They're innocent. I also brought a concussion grenade like you asked. Better than fragging the tweakers if they get caught in the middle.
Sure. Of course. They're innocent. I also brought a concussion grenade like you asked. Better than fragging the tweakers if they get caught in the middle.
If Coyote's here, we have to hurry. She's good but... well... these BTL guys pay to stay well informed. They may have known she was coming.
Wouldn't happen to be an Ares flight recorder, would it? Some very powerful buyers are looking for that right now. I can get rid of it for you, for say, 20%? That leaves 2,000 for you.
The inset gems alone are worth 800 nuyen or so, but a collector would probably pay more for that year's ring. You want me to get rid of it? 1200 nuyen.
I could certainly find someone interested in that information. Will take some legwork to verify the veracity of such a list... how about 2,000?
It'll take time for you to get top nuyen for it. Let's call it two thousand.
I'm very busy. You show me something worth my time, or you walk away.

The National Transportation Safety Board. This warehouse is used to go over the wreckage from plane crashes to try to determine what happened. The vic was in charge of their highest priority investigation at the moment.

Yeah, we have our own clubhouse and everything. As per our discussion, I'm informing you of another Ripper murder. The victim worked at the NTSB investigation facility down on the docks. You owe me for this.
Yes sir. Oh, did you get my message? I pulled enough evidence from the NTSB office computers to rule out the Emerald City Ripper. Looks like this is a copycat killing.
Yeah, see... you make a contribution to the fund, I put you on a list and let you know the next time we find any... orphans... that you might be interested in.

Tell me about it. Some runner like you probably offed him to cover up his Corp master's involvement and tried to make it look like a Ripper killing. Here's the office key. Check it out for yourself if you want.
Holmes drops to the ground, the light in his eyes fading fast. But something keeps the shriveled husk of his soul stuck to this mortal coil for a few moments more.
I could remake you as well. What wonderfully twisted thoughts must churn in a mind such as yours. But I'm more inclined to use you for parts.
I suppose I shouldn't be. After all, this is a place for broken things. It's only fitting that a broken mind should seek us out.
I'm simply in observation. And what I have next in store should prove most illuminating.
But what should I expect? This is a place for broken things, after all. And you are so very broken.
But the spirits have something else in store for you. A different path. You must finish what you've begun. You must confront the first evil that fostered the one we have just ended.
But there's no helping it now. I should just be grateful you were able to collect these items before those clods carted everything off.
I... I don't want that for him. Not what those poor souls have endured. My brother deserves to be free.
Come on. If we stay much longer, I'm liable to do something I'd regret. Or worse, something I'd enjoy.
Because of you, my brother's killer has met swift justice. And justice of the only sort such a man as Holmes deserved. Death.
Coyote may not have told you, but the penalty for being late with the delivery was no payment. But I'm feeling magnanimous tonight, so you guys can can keep the the gems I threw in your damn face.
What? You need runners again? Good. I got some new contacts. Some primo mercs.
If you're looking for runners again, I'm your guy. Discreet service only.
I'm smart enough not to ask my clients why they want what they want. I just arrange for them to get it. Now hand it over.
No kidding? Hrm. Well, whatever. She's tough. She'll pull through. So, who're you two?

We drove them elves all the way back to Yreka. Would have pushed them all the way back to Portland, too, but some ninny down south reached out to the Japanese for aid and got our own version of Normandy for the trouble.

From there, I wandered a bit. Plied my skills as a merc in a half dozen different wars, official or otherwise. Never did take to running the shadows like some of the boys I knew. Too subtle for my tastes, I suppose.
And if that wasn't enough, I also teach a safety and instructional course every weekend. This week we're covering bayonets. Mark my words, they're making a comeback.
Military life never taught me that. It was dealing to runners like yourself that afforded me this epiphany. You've got to be ready for anything.

Just in time. I've got a whole slew of new toys in from a supplier back east. Factory fresh and still smelling of their mother's gun oil. Maybe there's something in this batch that you'd be interested in?

First it was chanting. Priests and acolytes have been going down that hole since they locked me up. But then it changed to screaming. And something else. Something... foul. We've got to get out of here!
If things got as bad as you say there the guards everywhere, I can take get you by climbing down the from the balcony down the hall, we both need to get out of here quickly.
Way ahead of you. This node controls the doors. We're free. Now we just need to get out of here. I'll see you soon... I hope.
I write IC as a hobby, okay? Just trust me. And keep that... thing away from me!
There's no time! The "next level" the Universal Brotherhood is always talking about - I think they transform into bugs!

After all, what is religion but an organized collection of beliefs that relate meta-humanity to our spirituality? We believe that the Brotherhood is the highest form of religion because it brings us closer to the Truth.
I'M not selling anything! WE are giving away the SECRETS to a more fulfilling, happy, and productive life!

The Universal Brotherhood is a community that welcomes all forms of meta-humanity with the mission of making the world a better place by helping individuals to become so much more than they currently are.
I used to feel the same way! Then I heard Lynne Telestrian speak at my first Discovery Meeting and I realized what I'd been missing!
Happily! Mother Lynne is our chapter's most dynamic spokesperson. She is truly an inspiration to us all.
Sometimes staff leave keycards and uniforms in the locker room. Tell you what for 300 nuyen I could let you into the store room which connects to the locker room and you could look around.
There is no way I'm giving you my card for you to cause trouble with. That sort of thing would come back to haunt me.
The only computers I've seen in the place are in the office section of The Home, behind the staff only doors.
I only have access to the public space which we are in now; the storage room, locker room, and the office.
Oh yeah, like my grandpa used to say, "the check is in the mail." Don't think so.

Hey, it ain't like that! You don't know him. The team managers laced his food with battleboost drugs. Josie likes his head clear, but they don't listen. It's not his fault he crushed that guy's throat ...
Name's Donny. That's my name. DONNY. D. O. N. N. Y. I knew I didn't recognize you! I know everybody in this place. Everybody. Well, everybody on the first two floors...

I know, right! I haven't seen him in days. Dr. Philipe told me not to worry about it. He says I worry too much. But who am I supposed to play chess with? Donny over there can't suss more than match-four.
Wait, you SAW him? No, no, wait. I've never seen you. You can't have seen Josie. You aren't a doctor either. Awww. I just ... I feel really lost without him. Josie always helped me out.
Don't be like that. I'm just worried, you know? Don't tell Dr. Philipe, though. He said not to worry about Josie, and just make new friends. I just ... I feel really lost without him.

I'm sorry, I don't know. I only see Grandmother Jessica at special ceremonies and even then, only at a distance. You might ask Mother Lynne - Lynne Telestrian - if you can catch her in the Auditorium.
Father Willy is truly an inspiration. After years of living in the shadows he found the light about three years ago and now is a beacon for us to follow here at the Universal Brotherhood.
Mother Lynne is the family's best spokesperson. That she, who comes from so much, is willing to give so much for others is an inspiration to us all.
Yes of course, but here at the Universal Brotherhood, we are all one family and refer to each other as brothers, sister, mother or father.
Of course. Grandmother Jessica is the matriarch of our family here, she runs the Seattle chapter of the Universal Brotherhood.
Well, that's why you get paid the big bucks. Here's a credstick, you'll find the appropriate compensation is all there. It was a pleasure doing business with you.
So what? Sounds like you took care of it. Here's a credstick, you'll find the appropriate compensation is all there. It was a pleasure doing business with you.
Not a good move, friend... not a good move at all. I'm out of here, but someone will be in touch. Maybe not today, or tomorrow, but someday.
You got it. Here's a credstick, you'll find the appropriate compensation is all there. It was a pleasure doing business with you.
Johnson. The name's Johnson. Remember, you step out that door and the job's gone.

Name: Josiah C Dawson D.O.B.: 7/18/2015 Height: 1.9m Weight: 95 kg Occupation: Retired Allergies: None Medications: Alprazylam, Rabexatine Reason for stay: Post Traumatic Stress Disorder Status: Deceased

Having something this deadly in the lab always gets me on edge. One wrong dose of those meds and someone will lose an arm. That or the guys upstairs will just lock the doors and let the damn things eat us.
2:58 AM - The pilot cannot be contacted or located by a plane steward. 3:04 AM - The co-pilot radios in a mayday. 3:12 AM - The plane crashes into an empty field in western North Dakota.
Three days ago: "Meet with Delilah about gig." Today: "Meet Paco for date at Pike Place Market. Due in 30 minutes."

The Awakened Security Sentries were in varying condition when they arrived. Their general health is noted below: Subject 1: Good Subject 2: Average Subject 3: Average Subject 4: Excellent Subject 5: Poor

Every BTL junkie wants to get in with Stevie. Tell you what, I'll let you go upstairs and talk to him, maybe he likes you. If he decides he'd rather feed you to his hellhounds, well, that ain't on me.
Get your ass back in your squat before I break something else. I'll send him upstairs instead. You want me to give him to Stevie? Maybe after he kills that girl we caught...
You're living dangerously, moron. Don't you know who Mr. J is? He's the guy who uses morons like you for a freaking throw-rug!
Hey, I thought we had an understanding. Now leave me alone. I've got some upstanding customers here to deal with.
You make a persuasive case. I think I'd prefer to live. Here's the passcode for the elevator down the hall.

My Aunt Lynne told me the truth about Harkeem and how my father lied. She preyed upon my anger. I was so disgusted with him, it was easy for her to get me to leave and join her new family at the Universal Brotherhood.
I'm not okay... I can't sleep at all... I'm afraid that this is a dream and that I'll wake up there and still be there... with the... bugs.
The young, pretty elf has dark circles under her eyes and a haunted expression on her face. She recognizes you instantly.
I'm... I'm sure he's okay. They probably just took away his deck... Father wouldn't... No. He's okay.
Of course it went as planned. Harkeem is *amazing* in the Matrix. I'm sure I'll hear from him soon.
Glad you checked back, I am always getting new stuff in, so check the lists as I am sure you will find something you can't live without.
But why would he need to go to those lengths? Did the police records have something linking him to a different crime?
You look like someone who needs the latest in matrix tech. What can I get you?
Ah, that's beyond me. All I can get you is the gene code sequence.
David looks almost as tired as you do. You can tell that this case has gotten under his skin like it has yours.
Well, Lucy wasn't completely blind... but she was legally blind. She had to wear these huge glasses and hold things right up to her face. But she got new eyes about a year ago.
Well, I just thought if you could somehow get that necklace back before Lone Star cleans everything up... I could send it back to her family. I feel like I owe her that much.
No... she wouldn't talk much about it. Just called it her "stroke of good luck." I guess that luck ran out.
I see weird stuff every day. It's a Stuffer Shack. But no... nothing stranger than usual.
Wait... you wouldn't happen to be part of the investigation, would you?
Nothing you can do that this place hasn't done already. But if you're looking to get in on whatever went down upstairs, you're running late.
Yeah, everything in this body has gone to rust, 'cept my eyes and ears. Bit of a commotion upstairs, earlier. Stevie's men are twitchy.
Do I look like a trideo action star to you? Couple of Stevie's men came around, asking what anyone saw. Kept my mouth shut, I did.
Hold on now, that ain't necessary. I can get you into the stairwell... but you better not tell anyone it was me.
I actually used to. Long story. You know what? Go ahead and use the stairwell if you'd like. Save your friend.
Wow, never heard about that before. Sounds chill. I'll let you into the office. Use a terminal to log in and make yourself a new card.
Really sorry to hear that. I'll let you into the office and you can use a terminal to log in and make yourself a new card.
You shouldn't have a blank card. Brother Christopher takes the blank keycard from you.
Brother Christopher takes the blank keycard from you. You shouldn't have a blank card.
That makes no sense. I'm not letting you in until Mother Lynne is here with you.

The thug attempts to use his bulk and hideous breath to intimidate the shopkeeper. The old woman is holding firm... but you can see the thug's patience fading fast, and he looks like he's about to start breaking things.
You're not getting away that easy. I know your type, just going to go file a Lone Star report on me. Not this time!
None of your fraggin' business, streetstain. Back off before your blood ends up all over my nice sidewalk.
Oh, you're not getting away that easy. I know your type... gonna try to call Lone Star, eh? Not this time!
You think you're tough? I own this block. Back off before your blood ends up all over my nice sidewalk.

Yes. And no. I don't know. It's just... well, I was closing out some accounts, reviewing old invoices, and I came across something. A bill of sale from Sam, dated three years ago. I think it was his last run.
Maria Mercurial - the Silver Lady. She is the waviest. So smooth. I love her chromed cyberlimbs. She's kinda fallen off the radar lately, though. Looks like she's making a comeback!
No, no. You've already done so much for everyone here, including Sam. I just thought you might like to have it. I suppose I would only throw it out, otherwise.
It's gonna be hours. They just started setting up and a crowd is already forming. This is her town, so it's no surprise.
I'm happy to take your money, but only if you're buying new gear. Sam and I can settle up in the great beyond.
Sure... for the last coupl'a months I been sleeping there. But I spend my days out doin' odd jobs for the street merchants, or panhandling tourists over near the Seamstresses Union.
I keep tellin' ya... I need to get my stuff from the alley or I'm gonna die in the cold tonight.
I'm homeless, not helpless! Thank'ye... but no thanks. I remember the old days, the taste of REAL coffee, and let me tell ya - that drek? that's NOT real coffee.
Hey... what makes you think I'm SINless? Har! Just messin' with ya. 'Course I'm SINless. System I-dee number, my ass. What kinda questions ya got?
My stuff! Mighty decent of ya... don't see that kinda thing too often out here.

My lord Lofwyr knew this day would come but he did not know precisely when nor where. Your rescue of Mr. Telestrian's daughter has exposed the existence of an insect spirit for the first time in this cycle of the world.

Based upon the previous cycles of magic, the first insects are not due to appear for another 700 years. My lord Lofwyr believed he was well ahead of schedule. Something is different this time. It iss... concerning.
Brackhaus speaks slowly with a deep, melodious German accent. He takes his time, accentuating each word - relishing each vowel and each consonant - tasting them as if they were a delicacy.
Har'lea'quinn iss correct. The insect spirit will then slowly consume its host while transforming it into the spirit's own insectoid body, thus manifesting itself fully on this plane.
Eventually, the shaman completely succumbs, choosing the contentment and sense of clear purpose that being part of a hive provides. Perform your role. Serve your queen. That is all.
Oh, I see. Well, until you deliver them to Grandmother Jessica you're responsible for them, so don't let them go wandering off.
Scanning...please stand by... Lockdown Active. No Inner Sanctum security card detected! Intruder Alert!
Scanning... Please Standby... Approved uniform not recognized. Open fire!
That doesn't sound right to me. Now stay out of the restricted area or we will be forced to open fire.
The facility is on lockdown. The remote scanners cleared your badge, but who are these people?
I was wondering when you would ask. Actually, at one point in the early twenty-teens I knew the whole thing by heart. Sadly, those grey cells died a long time ago - maybe when I did.
Damned if I know! You live your life making stuff up, then you die, and end up on a stool in a bar in a story you made up. So meta.
Mostly, I just tell stories. But I'm occasionally good for some free gear, so come by to say hi anytime you're at the Union.
Why yes I do, here's a handy frag grenade. Be careful not to throw it near friendlies.
We no longer see the world of flesh, Seeker. Only the essence and auras of living things. Words, though... words may echo through the veil, and sometimes... sometimes we may hear them.
The spirits begin to fade. All but the one. Its eyes harden and it takes full measure of you, as if to commit everything about you to memory.
The spirits begin to fade. All but the one. Its eyes harden and it takes full measure of you, as if to commit everything about you to memory.
The spirits begin to fade. All but the one. Its eyes harden and it takes full measure of you, as if to commit everything about you to memory.
The elf... his essence remains in this place. Where the man died. Something has been left behind. A small part of him, perhaps.
Most of the time, I don't know if the cred I earn is worth it. But, its better than being one of those SINless scum - like the ones who did this!
I know it's "duty above all" for you security types but I am the victim here, I swear.
It's just so unfair! They have no right to take me down for something that security should have caught!
None of this will matter after I'm fired, out on the street, and eating dog food. Just leave me alone.
You don't have to tell me. In fact, I'd prefer if you didn't tell me anything. Just buzz.
Sorry, not without going through the proper channels. You go back to the coroner and tell him to clear this through Lone Star before you get back in my face again.
Look, you SINless garbage. I've got a job to do. Find a new blanket, or I'll find a reason to use my stun baton.
Sure dig in. I certainly wouldn't mind those guys getting taken down a peg or two. Man do they put on airs if you know what I mean.
Yeah... we've been spread pretty thin lately. Anyway, it's about fraggin' time someone showed up. Thanks for the relief.
You think I'm stupid? I go by the book, or I don't get paid. There's nothin' in the book about that bull-drek.
Oh, you know how it is. There was a girl, and a gun, and a back against the wall. You might say, me and this place... we were made for each other. I ain't gonna tell you more than that, omae.
Then you know you can hire us to run with you when you need expert help - not just any choob calling himself a runner. We cost more but we're worth it.
You got it! Look up the Nephilim Network next time you're hiring - you won't be sorry.
We're a tight unit. We cost a bit more than the common rabble but we're worth it.
I hear that, omae. I might have something for you, if you got the nuyen.

>>Project Terminated 5 days ago. Final invoices submitted to Saeder-Krupp Schwerindustriegesellschaft (Saeder-Krupp Heavy Industries Company). >>Project resources, status, and cost centers are restricted to CEO access.

>>Primary hits(s) on Watts, Jessica: Record not found >>Secondary hits(s) on Watts, Jessica: Watts, Melinda: Payment record(s) 1952681, 2911012 >>Billing system access not available from this terminal
>>Primary hits(s) on Watts, Sam: Record not found >>Secondary hits(s) on Watts, Sam: Watts, Melinda: Payment record(s) 1952681, 2911012 >>Billing system access not available from this terminal
>>Project established on 5/12/2053. >>Project terminated 5 days ago. >>Project resources, status, and cost centers are restricted to CEO access
>>10,000 nuyen monthly payment to Mitch McKlusky. Initiated on 5/20/2052 - payments ongoing.
All I can do is arrange a meeting with the administrator. He might be able to help you. Please wait in the common room up ahead, and I'll notify him.
I see. Well, I'm afraid our policy prevents us from discussing such things without a Corporation backing the investigation. Surely you understand.
$+(l.sir), this is a medical facility. If you're just here to make jokes at our expense, I'll have to ask you to leave.
It seems that the good doctor Holmes has something special planned for you. I'm afraid I can't let you leave.
I'm sure that can be arranged. Please wait in the common room up ahead, and I'll notify him.
And we were left to pick up the pieces, of course. But enough about my troubles, let's hear about yours. Tell me what ails you.
Days here tend to be slow, so I volunteer at a medical center on the other side of Touristville. And I had a rough shift.
You're testing me, aren't you? Trying to see just how long I can go without rest. Well, keep trying. How can I help you?
Hadn't you heard? Doctors don't like to talk about their problems. It makes us appear less godlike. But I'll humor you.
What always happens. Some run or some deal or some meet went south. One thing led to another, etcetera, etcetera.
The most important thing is DON'T TOUCH ANYTHING! Especially the damn alley door or the whole facility goes into lockdown mode.
Don't come in here looking for any food. I fed you janitors for cleaning my oven once an' you guys did a terrible job.
One goes to the cafeteria and the other goes to the Home area and the heavily guarded door to the Inner Sanctum.
It opens to the alley outside - DO NOT open that door or the whole damn facility goes into lockdown mode.
I don't want any trouble. I just cook here. Leave me out of whatever this is!
I can't beat that... Renraku froze all my personal funds while I'm here, for "security." All I have on me is ¥5,000. Let me go, and it's yours.
Wait, you're from Aztechnology, aren't you? I told them I wasn't interested in working for them!
The scientist looks absolutely bewildered. Who are you? W-why are you doing this?
Run. Somewhere. I don't know. But I shouldn't tell you anyway. Safer that way.

You've been running with New Larry for about six months now. He's a combat mage with a bad tattoo and a bad attitude. He knew Dowd almost as well as you did. Dowd. Never saw anybody die like that before. Idiot.

New Larry checks his watch. Licks his lips. Looks over your shoulder at the darkness. He's looking for someone and it's not the Fixer. Okay, I can see where this is going. You chummers are damaged. I'm out.
He stops and a smile slowly appears on his face. Honestly? It didn't take much. Just enough to get me back to Portland and set up with a cush corp job. I'm out of this racket.
New Larry relaxes and throws you a drek-eating grin. Looks like my new Renraku friends are finally here. They're gonna take that hard drive off your corpse... buddy.
Cut the drek, Sam. We both know why Dowd went down and it wasn't the Fixer or some other paranoid chip-dream of yours.

Some people eat it... but I wouldn't recommend that. Tough as nails. We mostly sell it to corp security teams who use it to reward their Hellhounds. The flamers go crazy for the stuff for some reason.
It means that your gang likes to stroll through here and relieve us merchants of our nuyen. My dad stood up to them... and he's still in the hospital.
I'll look it up... Yeah, got it right here. Two days past the pickup time, didn't think anyone was going to come for it. Here - it's all yours now.
Yeah... everything's swell. Manny continues to stare daggers in Paco's direction. The name's Manny. Now what do you want?
As soon as he notices Paco, the proprietor's eyes become hard and angry. What do you want? You know we can't afford more!
He lets out a sigh. Duty ABOVE All. It's Mr. Silverstar's favorite. I can't believe anyone can spout Telestrian Corporate Values when a bunch of our guys were geeked a few hours ago.
That's not right. The executive level is on lock down. I'm going to call your supervisor and double-check your instructions.
The guard scowls. Oh yeah? Well, I have a job, too. You think your cleaning takes precedence over my investigation?
He shakes his head. Yeah, they chewed through those guys pretty good. Must've been pros.
Not really. There's just as much nothing in there as the last time I checked.
He grins a lopsided grin. Oh yeah, chummer. Oh yeah. Better-Than-Life. Definitely better. Dreamchips. Mindbenders. SimStim. Simsense without peak limits. High-octane intensity.
The clocker looks around. More nervous now. Maybe yeah. Maybe. For the right price. You can feel it. What it's like to die. What it's like to kill.
Awright then. Awright good. Go on in and see my boy, Charlie. He'll set you up with a pass card. You see Charlie.
You wanna go on a ride? You can forget you're an ork for awhile. Worked for me.
You wanna go on a ride? You can forget you're a halfer for awhile.
Well, for your speed, hired help'll run you about 1,200 a head. If you start taking on tougher jobs... well, the more experienced the runner, the higher the rates.
Of course you do. That's why you came back. Street talk is that you are tracking the Ripper. What can I do for you, Ripper Tracker?
I appreciate this about you. Street talk is that you are a dangerous individual. What can I do for you, Dangerous Individual?
Come see me when your business in the Union is resolved, and we'll see about putting together a team.
Come see me when your business in the Union is resolved, and we'll see about putting together a team.
Well yeah, we need to get paid. Where the hell is the fixer?
Everyone in the Universal Brotherhood is a family member. We are all Brothers and Sisters, our leaders are Mothers and Fathers, and the matriarch of the Seattle chapter is called Grandmother.
I am so glad I could help! By just walking through these doors you have taken the first steps along a path that will change you forever.
Tell me something about yourself so that I can pair you with the right counselor.
I'm sorry but Grandmother Jessica is in the Inner Sanctum and cannot be disturbed.
Welcome to the Universal Brotherhood's Counseling Center. What's your name?
CURRENT EMPLOYMENT STATUS Dr. Henry Holmes currently holds the position of Chief Psychiatrist and Administrator at Mercy Mental Hospital Snohomish, Washington UCAS.
The file is quite large and takes well over an hour to read through. The final entry, however, is the most significant. It is written by Dr. Henry Holmes.
PEDIATRIC RECORD (PARTIAL) One particular pediatrician's entry stands out from the rest.
Data missing or corrupted. Contact your administrator for help.
EMPLOYMENT RECORDS LOCATED --> Henry Hollings Holmes MD, Phd.
The tall, fussy elf with the air of a Victorian butler studies you from far above your diminutive height before he speaks. He doesn't like what he sees.
The fussy elf with the air of a Victorian butler studies you from toes to horns before he speaks. He doesn't like what he sees.
The fussy elf with the air of a Victorian butler studies you from your toes to the tips of your pointed ears before he speaks.
The fussy elf with the air of a Victorian butler studies you before he speaks. He doesn't like what he sees.
Mr. Telestrian is waiting for you in his office. He is not one to be kept waiting.
You see uncertainty spread across the young officer's face. Well... you seem to know what you're doing. But bring that right back once it's safe. That could be important evidence.
The officer looks at you with poorly-concealed skepticism. Okay then. Make it quick.
I see. Well, thank you for your contribution, citizen. Don't forget that necklace you dropped. The officer smoothly pockets your money and turns away.
As you start to reach for the necklace, a slim black Lone Star boot slams down on the pavement. And what do you think you're doing?
No, we believe it is important to remove mundane distractions from our daily life so we can focus on the Truth. Our only computers are in the office, and that's off limits to the prospective members.
Sister Brenda can help you with that. Last I saw her, she was in front of the office door, inside the counseling center.
It is a place of great meditation to which only our senior members, our Mothers and Fathers, have access.
The Home, which is right behind these walls, is where the new Brothers and Sisters live.
Behind the Home is the Sanctuary where our more senior Brothers and Sisters live.
That's not up to me. The concert was only announced an hour ago but the tickets are already sold out. Sorry. Nothing I can do.
$+(l.sir), my job is to protect the Silver Lady. Do you think I'd be worth anything if I could be bribed that easily?
I'm sure you are. Ms. Mercurial has lots of friends in Seattle. She lives here.

Some thugs are shaking down the market we've set up here. It's been getting worse lately... I don't think we can afford to pay them anymore. But no one will stand up to them, and Lone Star isn't about to get involved.
I think there's only two of them, right now. I can't talk about price, but... but Mrs. James will surely reward you fairly.
Oh... thank you! Just keep heading north, you'll see it at the end of the street.
Oh... thank you! Just keep heading north, you'll see it at the end of the street.
See. Yes. I saw something. The other night I saw a spirit so dark, so ALIEN, that... Vlad trails off, and shudders.
Nothing. I didn't see anything. I... I... I just need my fix. But I can't get it because of the big pumpkin heads!
The word 'shaman' strikes a cord. He seems to shake off some of the mental cobwebs. Yes... yes, I am a shaman.
Th-thank you. I think you're right. I feel better now. More whole. Now... I think I need some sleep.
OK ok OoOok ok ok ok OK ok ok Ok oK ooooK. The broken man backs away, hiding his head in his hands.
He crosses his arms. Do you swallow every line our corp overlords spout at you? You look smarter than that. Whatever. Just get this place cleaned up and get out.
His eyes narrow and he fixes you with a look. Yeah? Well, right now, your responsibility is to clean up this mess and let me get back to work.
Hah! You said it. "Look we don't want to know how this happened. We just want to know whose fault it is!"
He rolls his eyes. Typical. It's gonna be a hell of morning with all this investigation drek going on.
He lets out a big sigh while shaking his head in agreement. I get it.
Look, I told you to watch yourself. Unless you want to be transfered to the Telestrian stables for shovel duty, you better get your act together.
I really don't need this drek. One more problem and your first day with the Telestrian Corporation will be your last.
You do that. And work on those people skills. You'll need 'em to get along around here.
You do that. And work on those people skills. You'll need 'em to get along around here.
I know it's crazy. The break-in has everyone on edge. Just learn quicker.
Well... as long as Mr. J gets what he needs, I see no reason we can't make a little extra at the same time.
Shut it, Zipper. We're almost done. As for YOU... leave or I'll put you under the knife next!

There's a guy on the door - Charlie - he sells the passes to get in. He's not tough. Blind in one eye. There's another five or so wandering around. Two of ‘em are bad news - covered in magic symbols. Mean.

Who doesn't? He's here all the time. Gino's a clocker - trades his time for chips - like their little errand boy. I saw him go in there this morning. Hasn't come out, so I imagine he's riding a dreamchip.
The woman is probably in her thirties but hard times have aged her. She looks at you with concern. Don't do it, friends. Don't slot that drek they're selling. BTLs are killers - theirs most of all!
She pulls her hair back to show you. No implant. Then her mouth tightens and her eyes well up in tears. I do. I know. Lost my husband. Lost my son. My daughter... they use her...
No. But Jamal has... my son's card. Took it off his... took it off him when his brain fried. Jamal's down the hall. Don't know if he'll give it up but that's between you and him.

Tell you what, if you feel sore about it, look into my family background a bit. There's gotta be people with money in there somewhere. Maybe one of them can throw you a few bucks. Take care, amigo. See you in hell.

If you're calling this number, that means the job is done, right? He closes his eyes. Shakes his head. Congratulations, amigo! I knew you'd do it. You were always the dependable one. More than me, anyway.
Sam still looks like drek. Same clothes, same background. Probably shot at the same time as the first video. Hey buddy! Looking good! Looking good! He giggles.
We're reinforcements, $+(l.sir)! Bratach Falan - Tir Tairngire Special Forces.
Yes, $+(l.sir)! Our six is clear. No bugs coming up behind us.
She laughs. You think I'm dumb enough to get caught out in the open by one of those assholes? Nah, I know these streets like the back of my hand. Worry about your own skin.
She looks you over, then nods. Don't need to worry about me, I know how to lay low. They're a tough bunch, though... don't say I didn't warn ya.
Her clothes may be dirty, but this woman is far from downtrodden. Hey, not that it's my business, but... I wouldn't go that way.
Hmm. Well... their leader's a big ol' troll named John Paul. Real piece of work, even for a 'weener.
Look... Paco... I needed an excuse to come back here and settle some debts. Figured... figured I might as well get paid for it. Her voice is strong still, but her body's beginning to shake.
No... Coyote speaks through gritted teeth. No. I need to finish the other thing I came here for... I need to find something for Mr. Delilah first. A stash of gems.
No time to talk. Coyote kneels and picks up the fallen guard's shotgun. It's time to finish this.
Yeah? And who said I needed rescuing? ... guess it turns out I did, though. Thanks.
Coyote is badly injured, but she's managing to hold it together.
